text:
Dorado (ドラド, Dorado) is a Heavens Arena's fighter and an anime-only character in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 43 (1999) 

Appearance

Dorado is a red-skinned bald man with various tribal-like tattoos on his body. 

Plot

Heavens Arena arc

Dorado is Killua's first opponent on the 200th floor. He can be seen wielding a double-headed spear. At the beginning of the match, Dorado gets the upper hand and is able to send Killua flying with some powerful blows from his spear. Later in the match, Killua retaliates by using his assassin techniques, defeating Dorado and breaking his spear in one hit, ending the match in the process. 

Abilities & Powers

Dorado is proficient at wielding a double-headed spear. He is strong enough to block a kick delivered by Killua from an unfavorable position. He managed to be an equal and tough match for Killua until the latter used his full power and knocked him out in one blow. 

Master Weapon Specialist: Dorado is extremely skilled with his double-headed spear. He can block attacks coming from a blind spot without moving from his position, simply interposing the spear. Thanks to its blades, length, and his mastery, he briefly out-powered Killua. 

Nen

Dorado is skilled in Conjuration and Transmutation. He combines them to extend the range of his blades and to release shock-waves powerful enough to shatter the ground when he swings them. 

Trivia

Dorado's appearance is very similar to Darth Maul from Star Wars.
Both characters also use double-bladed weapons.

The name Dorado may also be a reference to the fish of the same name, whose golden variety can contain the same brilliant orange colour in some of its body as Dorado's skin.
